{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Jin Sairus
| aliases = Patriarch Sairus
| children = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Amon]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Path of the White Fox]], warp the air}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Patriarch]], [[Wei Jin Sairus|Patriarch Sairus]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Wei Jin Sairus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Jin Sairus, also known as Patriarch Sairus, serves as the leader of the [[Wei clan]]. He is a powerful [[sacred artist]] who follows the [[Path of the White Fox]] and holds the rank of [[Ruler]]. Rather than managing the daily operations of his clan, which are handled by elders, he focuses almost exclusively on his own pursuit of power. He typically only emerges from seclusion to hunt for treasures, fight dangerous [[Remnants]], or confront rival clans. As a major source of his clan's strength, he acts as an idol for younger generations. In social and political settings, Sairus is capable of using his abilities to manipulate others through intimidation or illusion. He has demonstrated the capacity to inflict intense physical agony or blindness upon opponents and has used his authority to strategically corner individuals into difficult public positions.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As a high-status individual within the [[Wei clan]], Wei Jin Sairus serves as the [[Wei Patriarch]]. He is a [[Ruler]] on the [[Path of the White Fox]] and wears a [[jade]] scepter badge bearing the [[White Fox]] emblem upon his chest. During his time as Patriarch, he demonstrated the ability to warp the air around him and suggested that [[Lindon]] could exit the stage without losing honor. After awarding [[Kelsa]] a [[jade]] badge, the grandfather of [[Wei Jin Amon]] saw his body dissolve into foxfire.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] is the [[Wei Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] wears a [[jade]] scepter badge with the [[White Fox]] emblem on his chest.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] is a [[Ruler]] on the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] is the grandfather of [[Wei Jin Amon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]]'s body dissolved into foxfire.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Patriarch Sairus awarded [[Kelsa]] a [[jade]] badge.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] suggested [[Lindon]] could remove himself from the stage without dishonor.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] is a high-status individual in the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Patriarch Sairus can warp the air around him.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Jin Sairus lowered his arms, which had been raised to settle the audience. “Young Lindon, there is no dishonor if you remove yourself from the stage.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Wei clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
